stemHtml: The main reason why it is inadvisable to fly when suffering from a cold is that..

options.a: it can result in pain and damage to the eardrum, particularly during fast descents.
options.b: it can result in damage to the eardrum during gentle descents at high altitude.
options.c: swollen tissue in the inner ear will prevent the air from ventilating through the tympanic membrane.
options.d: swollen tissue in the Eustachian tube will cause permanent hearing loss.
